Excelente atención! Las instalaciones, impecables. Llevamos el auto a arreglar y nos cobraron un precio razonable. La entrega fue en el tiempo acordado

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service! The facilities were impeccable. We took the car in for repairs and were charged a reasonable price. Delivery was on time.

reviews.comment:
Es un lugar muy concurrido, ir con tiempo. Es semiautomático, una primer etapa automático, con maquinaria que lava el exterior y queda estupendo, como nuevo. Luego, por dentro del vehículo es manual y no quedé conforme, la limpieza es regular, incompleta. No aspiran el baúl, no lo abren. Consulté y me indicaron que esa limpieza no la realizan.

(Translated by Google)
It's a very busy place, so go early. It's semi-automatic, with a first automatic stage, using machinery that washes the exterior and leaves it looking great, like new. Then, the inside of the vehicle is manual, and I wasn't satisfied; the cleaning is average, incomplete. They don't vacuum the trunk, they don't open it. I inquired, and they told me they don't do that cleaning.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBOXFTdHR3RRAB

reviewReply.comment: Hola Mario, nos gustaría saber más respecto a tu calificación para poder brindarte una mejor experiencia y que mejore tu percepción!! Gracias!

reviews.comment:
Fui recién a comprar una lapicera, como no venden le pedí al chico de la caja del café si me indicaba un kiosco cercano.
Creo que se dió cuenta de que no quería alejarme mucho, me ofreció su lapicera, le dije que era para llevarme al depto. Me dijo que me la lleve 💚.
Parece una pavada pero escribo un diario y me alegró la mañana. Hay gente con ganas de hacerte la vida más fácil.
No le pregunté el nombre.
Gracias y los felicito!!!

(Translated by Google)
I just went to buy a pen. Since they don't sell them, I asked the guy at the coffee shop register if he could point me to a nearby kiosk.

I think he realized I didn't want to go too far, so he offered me his pen. I told him I needed it to take back to my apartment. He said I could have it 💚.
It seems silly, but I keep a journal, and it made my morning. There are people out there who want to make your life easier.

I didn't ask his name.
Thank you, and congratulations!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfZzliWWNnEAE
